front.title: MIMI Preauthorization based on deep references to MLS Credentials

abstract.t: This document describes a Work-In-Progress syntax called claim pointers that identify specific items in structured credentials, which often have nested levels of hierarchy; and claim matchers that facilitate comparisons between items in credentials and a target value. It also describes a new version of the More Instant Messaging Interoperability (MIMI) preauthorization format using claim pointers and claim matchers.
